nasb.text: Moreover, you played the harlot with the Assyrians because you were not satisfied; you played the harlot with them and still were not satisfied.

esv.text: You played the whore also with the Assyrians, because you were not satisfied; yes, you played the whore with them, and still you were not satisfied.

cnv.text: 可是，因為你還不滿足，又與亞述人行淫；你與他們行淫之後，還是不滿足。

ccb.text: 你欲海难填，又跟亚述人行淫，但仍不满足，
